entity.description: FairPrice Laundry Capsules Gardenia deliver 10x cleaning power, effectively eliminating 99.9% of bacteria, dust mites, stains, and odours. These all-in-one capsules also soften fabrics, reduce static, protect colours and are suitable for indoor drying. Enjoy a long-lasting fragrance with every wash, as your clothes are enveloped in a sweet floral scent with a touch of fruity and refreshing notes, delivering a clean, airy freshness that feels like a breath of fresh air.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Long lasting fragrance
• Kills 99.9% bacterial
• Colour protection

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Handle laundry capsules with dry hands.
X Do not cut or dissolve the capsules before use.

2. Place capsule into empty machine drum.
X Do not place in the dispensing drawer.

3. Load clothes and begin the wash cycle.
Capsules will dissolve when wet.

Suitable for use in both hot and cold washes, compatible with front and top-loading machines. The capsule will dissolve upon contact with water.

Recommended dosage:
S/M < 8kg - image of 1 capsule being added
L > 8kg - image 2 capsules being added

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct heat and sunlight.

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Alcohols, C12-16, Ethoxylated, Propylene Glycol, Dodecylbenzenesulfonic Acid, Monothanolamine Condensate, Water, Fatty Acid, Polyvinyl Alcohol, Glycerol, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Oleic Acid, Fragrance, Hybrid Additives, Citric Acid Monohydrate, Protease and Pigments.

value.name: FairPrice Laundry Capsules Refill - Gardenia

offers.description: Buy 1 FairPrice Laundry Capsules Refill - Gardenia @ $9.90

product.description:
• Keep out of reach of children.
• Avoid contact with eyes.
• Do not cut or break capsules.
• Do not put capsules in dispenser.
• Do not touch with wet hands.
• If swallowed, seek medical advice immediately.
• If capsules stick together, do not try to seperate them.

metaData.Key Information:
• Using Lion Japan technology with 5D Hygiene Power: Nano-Cleaning Power, 99.99% Anti-bacterial^, 99.99% Anti-virus+, Anti-malodour, Anti-mite dust
• Ultra-concentrated laundry capsules
• Colour Care
• Indoor drying
• Suitable for top load and front load washing machines
• 1 piece of capsule detergent could wash 10-20 pieces of clothes (equivalent to 7kg clothes wash load)
• With plant-based washing ingredient*
• Free of phosphate, artificial brighteners, bleaching agent
*Refers to main surfactant ^Confirmed with representative bacteria E. coli and Pseudomonas aeruginosa. Not all bacteria have been confirmed +Tested with SARS-CoV-2
metaData.Storage Information:
• Always keep package sealed tightly after use
• Store product in cool, dry place to prevent dissolving
• Keep away from heat and direct sunlight

Luxury meets every wash with the new Breeze Laundry Capsules with Fragrance Booster Beads! Elevate your laundry routine with our fragrance encapsulation technology that provides 7-day lasting fragrance* and 48-hour anti-odor* protection.

Try Breeze Laundry Capsules with Fragrance Booster Beads in Rose & Freesia for an elegant floral scent and give your clothes extra color protection and brightening.

*Based on lab test
